description: Create a two-column content slide on expected 2019 private equity M&A activity by industry, with a horizontal bar chart on the left and takeaway bullets on the right.

header.kicker: Development of the European private equity market
header.headline: Pharma & healthcare, TMT and business services & logistics are expected to yield the most M&A deals with PE involvement in 2019
header.sub: Likelihood of a high number of M&A transactions by industry – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

left.title: "In what industries do you expect to see the most M&A transactions with PE involvement in 2019?"

items.text: The pharma & healthcare, TMT and business services & logistics industries are expected to be the most active in terms of the number of M&A transactions with PE involvement
Respondents also expect the consumer goods and financial services sectors/industries to account for a large number of M&A transactions in 2019
A fairly low number of PE transactions is expected in the building & construction industry (a decline of 11 ppt. from last year's survey)
